description_long: This is a young adult female figure dressed in a modern, sporty outfit suitable for urban environments. She wears a cropped long-sleeve top with a high collar and a short pleated skirt, both featuring a coordinated design. Her head is covered with a beanie, and her hair is styled to one side, visible beneath the hat. The figure's footwear consists of casual sneakers, and her arms are extended slightly outward in a relaxed, neutral pose. The clothing and accessories suggest a casual, youthful, and active lifestyle. The overall appearance is clean, stylized, and visually appealing, with attention to detail in the clothing and posture.
description: A young adult female in a sporty, modern outfit with a beanie, pleated skirt, and sneakers, posed in a relaxed standing position. The figure exudes a casual, urban vibe with detailed clothing and accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the beanie, facial features, cropped top, pleated skirt, and sneakers, with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the beanie, hair, and the layered effect of the skirt and top.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the beanie, hair, open-back detail of the top, and the pleats of the skirt.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile, arm, and the layered clothing from a different angle.
attribute_clothing_type: sporty cropped long-sleeve top, pleated mini skirt, beanie hat
attribute_hairstyle: long hair styled to one side under a hat
